message: Implemented WarningScreen family with severity-based icons, colors, and event emission. Added integration tests.
review_notes: WarningScreen accepts title, body, button_text, severity (warning|error|dire_warning), and optional custom icon via route args.
ErrorScreen and DireWarningScreen are trivial subclasses that fix severity.
UI uses LVGL default fonts; icon colors reflect severity (yellow, red, orange-red).
Emits standard actions: 'button_pressed' on hardware OK or on-screen button click, 'back' on hardware back.
Integration test verifies screen creation, text rendering, and event emission for all three variants.
No 'warning edges' pulsing border implemented (omitted as per suggestion).
Palette colors approximate SeedSigner's design; icon symbols use LV_SYMBOL_WARNING/CLOSE.
All new files added to CMakeLists.txt and compiled successfully.
